description_long: A muscular adult male is depicted wearing a traditional kilt-style garment with a single-shoulder drape, exposing his chest and one arm. He carries a large woven basket on his back, filled with cut logs, secured by a strap across his torso. His footwear consists of rugged, lace-up boots suitable for outdoor terrain. His long hair is styled in thick braids, and he wears a decorative brooch or clasp at the shoulder. The figure is making a peace or victory sign with his right hand, adding a dynamic and expressive gesture. The overall appearance suggests a blend of historical and rustic elements, suitable for a character in a period or fantasy urban setting.
description: A muscular adult male in a kilt-style garment with a log-filled basket on his back, rugged boots, and braided hair, making a peace sign gesture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the exposed chest, kilt, basket of logs, and peace sign gesture.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the woven basket full of logs and the back of the kilt.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the basket, braided hair, and the strap securing the load.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the draped garment, muscular build, and expressive hand gesture.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional kilt-style garment with single-shoulder drape and decorative brooch
attribute_posture: walking with one arm raised in a peace sign gesture
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in thick braids
